name: Has Dossier Item
description: Connects the dossier root to graph entities included in this publication

name: Has Type
description: Connects an entity to its type when using explicit type nodes

name: Has Topic
description: Groups a dichotomy by topical lens

name: Has Continuum Position
description: Connects a dichotomy to its synthesized continuum placement

name: Has Evidence Strength
description: Connects evidence-bearing entities to normalized strength categories

name: Uses Research Design
description: Connects sources or initiatives to evaluation design tags

name: Cites Source
description: Connects claims and content entities to supporting research sources

name: Key Initiative
description: Connects a dichotomy to representative initiatives

name: Related Dichotomy
description: Connects an initiative back to relevant debates

name: Supports Claim
description: Connects a source to a claim it supports

name: Measures Outcome
description: Connects an initiative to measured output families

name: Changes Input
description: Connects an initiative to input-variable families

name: Explains Method
description: Connects method guide entities to research design categories

name: Has Block
description: Optional content block relation for narrative sections
